hub.title: Contribute to Hospeda
hub.description: Help us improve Hospeda: report errors, contribute destination photos or join as a blog and events editor.
hub.heading: Contribute to Hospeda
hub.subtitle: Hospeda is built by all of us. Choose how you want to help.

report.title: Report incorrect information
report.description: Spotted outdated data or an error on a destination? Let us know and we'll fix it.

photos.title: Contribute your photos
photos.description: Share your best photos of the Litoral destinations and help show them at their best.

editors.title: Join as an editor
editors.description: We're looking for volunteer editors for the blog and the events calendar. Apply and write with us.

report.title: Report incorrect information
report.description: Found incorrect or outdated information on a destination? Tell us and we'll fix it.
report.heading: Report incorrect information
report.subtitle: Spotted something off on a destination? Tell us what you found and the team will review it. If you arrived from a destination page, we already noted it in the message.

photos.title: Contribute your destination photos
photos.description: Share your best photos of the Litoral destinations. Check the usage terms and send us your contribution.
photos.heading: Contribute your photos
photos.subtitle: Many Litoral destinations still lack photos that do them justice. If you have good shots, this is your page.

how.heading: How does it work?
how.step1: Tell us which destination your photos are from and what they show.
how.step2: If they are already online (Drive, Dropbox, etc.), paste the links in the message.
how.step3: Otherwise, we'll reply by email to coordinate the delivery.

terms.heading: Photo usage terms
terms.intro: Before sending your photos, read these conditions. They are short and clear:
terms.item1: The photos you send must be your own work or have the author's permission.
terms.item2: By sending them, you authorize Hospeda to publish them on the site and its social media, always crediting the author.
terms.item3: You keep the rights to your photos: you can ask us to remove them at any time.
terms.item4: Do not send photos with identifiable people without their consent.

editors.title: Join as an editor
editors.description: We're looking for volunteer editors for Hospeda's blog and events calendar. Apply and write with us.
editors.heading: Join as an editor
editors.subtitle: The blog and the events calendar grow with people who know and love the Litoral. If you enjoy writing or curating content, apply.

role.heading: What does an editor do?
role.item1: Write or review blog articles about the Litoral destinations.
role.item2: Load and curate calendar events: dates, venues, descriptions.
role.item3: Suggest topics and help keep the content up to date.

form.heading: Apply
form.hint: Tell us who you are, what you'd like to write about and whether you have experience (not required).

form.messageError: The message must be at least 10 characters
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us the details of your contribution here...
form.successMsg: We'll review it and contact you by email if we need more details.
form.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

photos.title: Got photos of this destination?
photos.description: Share them with the community and help show it at its best.

photosListing.title: Got photos of these destinations?
photosListing.description: Add your photos and help show the Litoral at its best.

editors.description: We're looking for volunteer editors for the blog and the events calendar.

editorsEvents.description: We're looking for volunteer editors to load and curate the calendar events.
